strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience across multiple languages/frameworks; far exceeds 6+ year requirement
Current AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq directly aligns with required AI agent development skill
Demonstrated testing culture: created test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), practiced TDD at RIDE Capital, organized Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; resume shows Node.js and GraphQL but not the primary framework in the stack
Vitest not mentioned; has general testing knowledge but no evidence of this specific testing framework
PostgreSQL not evidenced; resume shows MongoDB and MySQL but missing one of three required databases

key_factors.factor: Fundamentals and depth exceed role level
Nest.js and Vitest gaps in primary stack
AI agent experience requirement met at current role

response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the experience requirement with 15+ years of fullstack work and is currently building AI agent infrastructure at re:cinq, directly addressing a core requirement. Strong evidence of TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and testing expertise aligns with the stack. However, neither Nest.js nor Vitest appear in the resume despite being explicitly required in the primary stack—these are framework-specific gaps rather than foundational skill gaps. PostgreSQL is also not mentioned (has MongoDB and MySQL instead). For a Staff-level engineer with this demonstrated ability to master new technologies across languages, these are learnable gaps, but they represent a 2-3 week onboarding cost on a standard tech stack.
